description: Per-task provenance + decontamination record for LHC v0.2. Generated 2026-05-10 to satisfy the audit-trail promise in evals/v0.2/AUTHORING.md §6 that was previously unfilled (round-5 reviewer caught this).
check_task_script_status: NOT YET WRITTEN. AUTHORING.md §5 referenced check_task.py which does not exist. v0.2 tasks were authored with manual contamination review (cross-checked against banned_overlap.json by the author during writing). The script will land alongside future task additions.

tasks.decontamination_method: manual review against banned_overlap.json — entity names, scaffolding phrases, domain shapes checked at write time. v0.2 task scenarios use distinct domains from any v0.1 task in the same category slot.
tasks.why_non_overlapping: See task scenario in YAML; v0.2 tasks intentionally span hospital/restaurant/library/court/jewelry/rideshare/etc. domains rather than re-using the engineering on-call / customer-success / agent-loop frames present in v0.1 seeds and synthetic data.
